title: Cache Performance, Scope, Integrity, and Poisoning Defense · Workflow and Release Recall
summary: An operations handoff reconstructs cache performance, scope, integrity, and poisoning defense from delayed run evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the cache threat and measurement policy under changed load. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for cache threat and measurement policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate disposable performance caches from immutable artifacts, job outputs, external registries, and release records by trust and lifetime.
Construct keys from OS, architecture, tool, dependency lock, relevant configuration, and cache version with bounded restore fallback.
Restrict who can save or restore executable caches across fork, branch, event, workflow, and privilege boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Ci Cache Artifact Distinction
steps.instruction:
Order the Ci Cache Artifact Distinction delivery-system evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Ci Cache Artifact Distinction.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Ci Cache Artifact Distinction assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Ci Cache Artifact Distinction, keep Ci Cache Artifact Distinction connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.text: A review privileged release restores executable cache content written by a fork through a broad fallback key. Compare cold and warm time, key scope, save authority, poisoning risk, and immutable artifact separation. Competency probe: Separate disposable performance caches from immutable artifacts, job outputs, external registries, and release records by trust and lifetime.

content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Measure cold and warm dependency, build, test, upload, queue, and critical-path time while preserving a regular cold-path regression run.
